sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28027" key="docomimhtikh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δοξο-μῑμητική</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέχνη</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n28027.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">his art,</tr_> ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
